arabic: فِي اَلْمَدِينَةِ بَيْتٌ كَبِيرٌ وَجَمِيلَةٌ جَارَةٌ.

transliteration: fī al-madīnati baytun kabīrun wa-jamīlatun jāratun.
judge_comment: Word salad; the second half of the sentence is ungrammatical and lacks clear meaning.
